home.hero_desc: Access high-quality education from world-class experts. Our curriculum is designed to help you master new skills and reach your career goals in record time.
home.programs_desc: Tailored learning paths for every stage of your journey.
home.cta_title: Ready to start your learning journey?
home.cta_desc: Join thousands of students achieving their dreams with our expertly crafted courses and live mentorship.
home.features_desc: EduCore brings together courses, live sessions, and progress tracking — all in one powerful platform.
home.feature1_desc: Join live classes and interact with instructors in real time.
home.feature2_desc: Follow curated paths designed by experts to fast-track your growth.
home.feature3_desc: Detailed analytics help you stay on top of your learning journey.
home.testimonials_desc: Real stories from our community of learners around the world.
home.our_features_desc: This very extraordinary feature can make learning activities more efficient and enjoyable for everyone.
home.classroom_features_desc: This very extraordinary feature, can make learning activities more efficient
home.classroom_feature1_desc: Teachers don't get lost in the grid view and have a dedicated Podium space.
home.classroom_feature2_desc: TA's and presenters can be moved to the front of the class.
home.classroom_feature3_desc: Teachers can easily see all students and class data at one time.
home.support_title: Our friendly support team is here to help.
home.support_desc: Lorem ipsum dolor sit amet, consectetur adipiscing elit. Ut elit tellus, luctus nec ullamcorper mattis, pulvinar dapibus leo.
home.why_card1_desc: Personal sessions tailored to your goals and learning pace.
home.why_card2_desc: Collaborative learning with peers from around the world.
home.why_card3_desc: Access free resources and exercises to boost your skills.
home.allinone_desc: TOTC is one powerful online software suite that combines all the tools needed to run a successful school or office.
home.feature_billing_desc: Simple and secure control of your organization's financial and legal transactions. Send customized invoices and contracts.
home.feature_scheduling_desc: Schedule and reserve classrooms at one campus or multiple campuses. Keep detailed records of student attendance.
home.feature_tracking_desc: Automate and track emails to individuals or groups. Skilline's built-in system helps organize your organization.
home.whatis_desc: TOTC is a platform that allows educators to create online classes whereby they can store the course materials online, manage assignments, quizzes and exams, monitor due dates, grade results and provide students with feedback all in one place.
home.blog_title1: Top Online Learning Strategies to Maximize Productivity
home.blog_title2: How to Build a Successful Virtual Classroom
home.blog_desc1: Discover science-backed methods that help you absorb information faster.
home.blog_desc2: A complete guide for instructors on building interactive digital environments.
home.blog_desc3: Learn the skills employers are looking for and how to acquire them online.
home.why_desc: EduCore offers a modern and flexible learning experience designed to help you build real skills, learn from experts, and achieve your goals faster with confidence.
home.why_feat1_desc: Learn from certified professionals with real-world expertise.
home.why_feat2_desc: Join live sessions and interact with instructors in real time.
home.why_feat3_desc: Study at your own pace with sessions that fit your schedule.
home.why_feat4_desc: Connect with thousands of learners and grow together.

footer.desc: The Digital Atrium for modern learners. Curated educational excellence for those who seek the best.
footer.newsletter_desc: Stay updated with new courses and news.
footer.copyright: © 2026 EduCore Digital Atrium. All rights reserved.
